mapper.select: SELECT TOP 1 et.id AS evalTypeId, etm.evaluator_no AS evaluatorNo, eval_emp.name AS evaluatorName, etm.evaluatee_no AS evaluateeNo, e.name AS evaluateeName, e.position AS position, e.dept_id AS deptId, d.name AS deptName, et.start_date AS startDate, et.end_date AS endDate, cc.name AS statusName FROM eval_target_mapping_52 etm JOIN eval_type_52 et ON et.id = etm.eval_type_id JOIN employee_52 e ON e.emp_no = etm.evaluatee_no LEFT JOIN employee_52 eval_emp ON eval_emp.emp_no = etm.evaluator_no LEFT JOIN department_52 d ON d.id = e.dept_id LEFT JOIN code_common_52 cc ON cc.code = CAST(etm.status AS VARCHAR) WHERE etm.eval_type_id = #{evalTypeId} AND etm.evaluatee_no = #{empNo}
